description: Gainsight provides customer success and product experience software. Its products include Gainsight CS for managing customer lifecycle workflows and Gainsight PX for product analytics and in-app engagement.
summary: Gainsight exposes Gainsight CS REST APIs, a Gainsight CS MCP server, and a separate Gainsight PX REST API; CS APIs support access-key and OAuth-based auth, while the MCP server uses OAuth with PKCE.
